source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1
distilled_thesis: The prologue begins by leaving mountain homeland and lake behind, marking a spatial break from reflective origin before the later turn toward humans.
